name: codex-chat-manager-raycast
title: Codex Chat Manager
description: Browse and manage local Codex conversations with codex-chat-manager.
author: grikomsn

preferences.name: managerBinaryPath
preferences.title: Manager Binary Path
preferences.description: Optional absolute path to codex-chat-manager. Leave empty to use codex-chat-manager from PATH.

preferences.name: codexHome
preferences.title: CODEX_HOME Override
preferences.description: Optional Codex home directory override. Leave empty to use the current environment or ~/.codex.

commands.name: conversations
commands.title: Conversations
commands.description: Browse and manage all Codex conversations
